title: Device Home Screen - Unsupported device
scenario: Unsupported device (e.g., BB Fit, Sync 60) appears in the Poly Studio Mobile app home screen device list after pairing
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Pair and connect an unsupported device (e.g., BB Fit, Sync 60) via Bluetooth.
3. Observe the Home screen of the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Check the device list displayed on the Home screen.
expected: The unsupported device (e.g., BB Fit, Sync 60) should NOT appear in the device list on the app's Home screen, as the app does not support managing that device.
